allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['result']; [print\(p['id'], p['model']\) for p in items if 'poster' in p['model'].lower\(\) or 'print' in p['model'].lower\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['result']; [print\(p['id'], p['model']\) for p in items if 'poster' in p['model'].lower\(\) or \('print' in p['model'].lower\(\) and 'all-over' not in p['model'].lower\(\)\)]")
